LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-23-2020 HEARING RE: MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL RE: PLAINTIFF HEATHER GUTIERREZ, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOVANT PAUL GLUSMAN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL TO PLAINTIFF HEATHER GUTIERREZ IS DENIED IN VIEW OF THE IMPENDING DECEMBER 7, 2020 TRIAL DATE. COUNSEL OWES A DUTY TO HIS CLIENT TO TAKE REASONABLE STEPS TO AVOID FORESEEABLE PREJUDICE TO HER RIGHTS, SUCH AS GIVING THE CLIENT SUFFICIENT NOTICE TO PERMIT THE CLIENT TO RETAIN OTHER COUNSEL. (CAL. R. PROF'L CONDUCT 1.16(D).) IN VIEW OF MS. GUTIERREZ'S REPORTED REFUSAL TO COMMUNICATE WITH COUNSEL OVER THE LAST EIGHT MONTHS, COUNSEL SHOULD HAVE SOUGHT TO BE RELIEVED EARLIER. THE MOTION CANNOT BE GRANTED UNLESS COUNSEL FIRST SEEKS A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND COMMUNICATES THE NEW TRIAL DATE TO MS. GUTIERREZ. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Feb-08-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Civil
Off Calendar Nov-23-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NICHOLAS MORRELL, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for Defendants San Francisco Otolaryngology Medical Group Inc. and Union Square Hearing, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Re: Plaintiff Heather Gutierrez.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Movant Paul Glusman's motion to be relieved as counsel to Plaintiff Heather Gutierrez is denied in view of the impending December 7, 2020 trial date. Counsel owes a duty to his client to take reasonable steps to avoid foreseeable prejudice to her rights, such as giving the client sufficient notice to permit the client to retain other counsel. (Cal. R. Prof'l Conduct 1.16(d).) In view of Ms. Gutierrez's reported refusal to communicate with counsel over the last eight months, counsel should have sought to be relieved earlier. The motion cannot be granted unless counsel first seeks a continuance of the trial date and communicates the new trial date to Ms. Gutierrez.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
